upcoming.title: Transport Futures Africa Annual Conference 2025: Connecting the Continent
upcoming.description: Our flagship annual gathering brings together 400+ transport researchers, practitioners, and senior policymakers from across Africa for two days of keynotes, panel discussions, and working sessions on the continent's most urgent mobility challenges.

upcoming.title: Electric Mobility in Africa: What the New AfDB Strategy Gets Right and Wrong
upcoming.description: Prof. Sarah Chen and Dr. James Okafor present our rapid response analysis of the African Development Bank's new Green Mobility Strategy, with a discussion of what's missing and where the real policy leverage for African governments lies.

upcoming.title: Urban Freight and Last-Mile Logistics: Policy Solutions for Africa's Congested Cities
upcoming.description: An invitation-only roundtable for urban planners, logistics operators, and transport ministry officials to discuss regulatory and infrastructure solutions for urban freight congestion across West Africa's megacities. Invitation only — contact us to express interest.

upcoming.title: The Annual Transport Futures Africa Lecture: Infrastructure, Equity, and the African City
upcoming.description: Our annual public lecture, open to all. This year's lecturer is Prof. Vanessa Watson (University of Cape Town) speaking on planning for informality — why Africa's cities need new frameworks, not borrowed ones.

past.title: East African Rail Symposium: Continental Connectivity or White Elephants?
Annual Lecture: The Political Economy of African Transport Finance
Roundtable: EV Charging Infrastructure for African Cities
